top_signals.title: Lagarde Says Energy-Price Hikes Spreading Through Economy
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde warned that high energy prices are starting to feed through to other parts of the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Scottish Bonds to Create ‘Financial Referendum’ on Independence
top_signals.summary: The Scottish government is for the first time giving the bond market a say over the risks of the nation breaking away from the UK.

top_signals.title: What is the hottest Gen-Z tech trend? Anti-AI
top_signals.summary: Many of the models now being hunted online were released before their new owners were born.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Regulator Clears LNG Strike
top_signals.summary: The Australian Fair Work Commission has denied Inpex a request to stop a strike at the Ichthys facility that would affect production and exports at the 9.2-million-ton facility. According to a Reuters report, the operator of Ichthys had applied to the labor regulator for a suspension of the industrial action amid persistent failure to reach an agreement with trade unions. The WTC, however, sided with the strikers, rejecting the Japanese company’s argument that suspension of normal operations at the LNG platform would affect the Australian…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
